description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring a light stone or concrete exterior. The front facade includes a large garage door, a main entryway with a metal awning, and a staircase leading to the upper level, which is partially open and surrounded by a wooden railing. Tall, slender palm trees and rectangular planters add greenery to the property, enhancing its urban curb appeal. The windows are narrow and horizontally aligned, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The house sits on a paved sidewalk, with a wooden privacy fence enclosing one side and a driveway extending from the garage. The overall structure is boxy and geometric, with clean lines and a neutral color palette.
description: A modern, boxy two-story house with a flat roof, stone exterior, garage, and palm trees, featuring minimalist windows and a wooden staircase.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage door, main entryway with awning, staircase to the upper level, and two tall palm trees in planters.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the plain stone wall with three narrow windows and a glimpse of the open upper floor interior.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat, unadorned wall, wooden fencing, and the upper-level balcony with railing and palm trees.
description_view_3: Side view with a clear look at the wooden staircase, privacy fence, and the integration of landscaping with the house structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with narrow horizontal windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a metal awning, steps, and a large garage door, flanked by planters and palm trees.
